Metadata.description: Data Platform Exchange Ontology - ESDL Aligned (v2)

conventions.naming: snake_case for all field and table names. Names are DPX-native, inspired by ESDL with sprinkles of SunSpec — not bound to either spec.
conventions.phaseNaming: Three-phase systems use l1/l2/l3 (not phase_a/b/c). Line-to-line voltages use l1_l2, l2_l3, l3_l1.
conventions.implicitDefaults: Energy and power are implicitly active (vs reactive/apparent) and implicitly AC (vs DC). Reactive, apparent, and DC are always called out explicitly. The ac_/dc_ prefix is kept only on dual-side assets (Inverter, Battery).
conventions.boundaryVsConversion: Boundary assets (EConnection, GConnection, HConnection, WaterConnection) use import/export/consumption. Conversion assets in the middle (Inverter, HeatPump, PVInstallation) use directional descriptors (production, output, dc_*).
conventions.energyUnit: kWh for electricity. Heat uses GJ (district-heating billing convention).

Area.description: The Area class represents a physical geographic area or a more abstract logical area. In both cases it is the 'asset container', in a sense that all assets within the area are contained by the Area instance.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique id of this area

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name for this area

attributes.name: scope
attributes.description: The scope that this area describes, such as Country, Province, Energy Region, etc.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Type of area (e.g. road, terrain, water, etc.)

attributes.name: geometry_reference
attributes.description: Defines a URI to reference the geometric shape of this area

attributes.name: building_density
attributes.description: Defines the number of buildings per m²

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this object

attributes.name: name

attributes.name: short_name

attributes.name: original_id_in_source
attributes.description: ID of item in the original data source

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Describes the building types (e.g. Vrijstaande woning, Rijwoning...)

attributes.name: energy_label
attributes.description: Dutch system for energy labels (A, B, F...)

attributes.name: floor_area
attributes.description: In m²

attributes.name: asset_type
attributes.description: The type (e.g. model number) of the asset

attributes.name: owner
attributes.description: Defines the owner of an asset

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: Specify the 'state' of an Asset (OPERATIONAL, PLANNED)

attributes.name: surface_area
attributes.description: The surface that is occupied by this asset

attributes.name: commissioning_date
attributes.description: If in future, it is a planned asset

attributes.name: decommissioning_date
attributes.description: If in past, it is a decommissioned asset

attributes.name: installation_duration
attributes.description: Time required to install the asset

attributes.name: aggregated
attributes.description: Defines if this Asset is aggregated of other assets

attributes.name: aggregation_count
attributes.description: Number of assets that are aggregated

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_consumption_total
telemetryMetrics.description: Total energy consumed by the building (grid import + on-site PV self-consumption). Formula: energy_import + energy_self_consumption.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_self_consumption
telemetryMetrics.description: Energy generated on-site by PV and consumed directly by the building. Formula: pv_energy_production - pv_energy_exported.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_net_grid
telemetryMetrics.description: Signed net grid flow. Positive = net import (building consumed more than it generated). Negative = net export. Formula: energy_import - energy_export.

telemetryMetrics.name: solar_irradiance
telemetryMetrics.description: Environmental solar radiation intensity measured at the building location. Reported per-building when the source provides building-scoped sensor data without a separate WeatherStation asset.

telemetryMetrics.name: fcr_value
telemetryMetrics.description: FCR (Frequency Containment Reserve) registration value reported per building. Non-standard ESDL telemetry, retained for ecosphere operational data.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_consumption_daily
telemetryMetrics.description: Total building energy consumption today; resets at local midnight.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_self_consumption_daily
telemetryMetrics.description: Building energy self-consumed from on-site PV today; resets at local midnight.

attributes.name: efficiency

attributes.name: operational_hours

attributes.name: full_load_hours
attributes.description: Number of hours the asset would run at nominal power to produce its total output

PVInstallation.description: Defines a Photo Voltaic Installation, e.g. roof top PV, a PV field or parc.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_import_low
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative energy imported from the grid on the low tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_import_normal
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative energy imported from the grid on the normal tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_export_low
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative energy exported to the grid on the low tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_export_normal
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative energy exported to the grid on the normal tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_import_low
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative reactive energy imported on the low tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_import_normal
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative reactive energy imported on the normal tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_export_low
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative reactive energy exported on the low tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_export_normal
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative reactive energy exported on the normal tariff.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_import
telemetryMetrics.description: Total grid energy imported across all tariffs. Formula: ac_energy_import_low + ac_energy_import_normal.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_export
telemetryMetrics.description: Total grid energy exported across all tariffs. Formula: ac_energy_export_low + ac_energy_export_normal.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_net
telemetryMetrics.description: Signed net flow at this connection. Positive = net import, negative = net export. Formula: energy_import - energy_export.

telemetryMetrics.name: is_peak_import
telemetryMetrics.description: True when grid import is in a peak-demand window.

telemetryMetrics.name: is_peak_export
telemetryMetrics.description: True when grid export is in a peak-demand window.

telemetryMetrics.name: current_rms
telemetryMetrics.description: True-RMS current at the metering point.

telemetryMetrics.name: current
telemetryMetrics.description: AC current component at the metering point.

telemetryMetrics.name: dc_current
telemetryMetrics.description: DC current component at the metering point.

telemetryMetrics.name: power
telemetryMetrics.description: Active power at the metering point (direction-neutral; flow direction is on the dim).

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_cumulative
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative active-energy register reading (direction-neutral; flow direction is on the dim).

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_interval
telemetryMetrics.description: Active energy in the measurement interval, derived as the delta of the cumulative register.

telemetryMetrics.name: power_import
telemetryMetrics.description: Instantaneous active power imported from the grid.

telemetryMetrics.name: power_export
telemetryMetrics.description: Instantaneous active power exported to the grid.

telemetryMetrics.name: power_net
telemetryMetrics.description: Signed net active power at this connection (positive = net import, negative = net export).

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_consumption
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative active energy consumed at this metering point.

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_import
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative reactive energy imported from the grid (non-tariff-split).

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_export
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative reactive energy exported to the grid (non-tariff-split).

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_net
telemetryMetrics.description: Signed net reactive energy at this connection (positive = net import, negative = net export). Formula: reactive_energy_import - reactive_energy_export.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_throughput
telemetryMetrics.description: Gross active energy throughput at this connection (import + export). Formula: energy_import + energy_export.

telemetryMetrics.name: reactive_energy_throughput
telemetryMetrics.description: Gross reactive energy throughput at this connection (import + export). Formula: reactive_energy_import + reactive_energy_export.

telemetryMetrics.name: is_peak_demand
telemetryMetrics.description: True when this interval represents peak demand (direction-neutral; for sources that report a single combined peak flag rather than separate import/export peaks).

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_export_daily
telemetryMetrics.description: Energy exported to the grid today; resets at local midnight.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this object

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name describing this object

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Human readable description of this object

attributes.name: short_name
attributes.description: Short name for this object, e.g. used in legends of graphs in presentations

attributes.name: original_id_in_source
attributes.description: ID of item in the original data source.

attributes.name: asset_type
attributes.description: the type (e.g. model number) of the asset

attributes.name: owner
attributes.description: Defines the owner of an asset (free text).

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: The AssetStateEnum allows to specify the 'state' of an Asset, mainly used for manually simulating different scenarios.

attributes.name: capacity
attributes.description: The capacity of the transport asset in Watts (as opposed to the Storage capacity, which is in Joules).

attributes.name: efficiency
attributes.description: The efficiency of the transport asset.

attributes.name: full_load_hours
attributes.description: An annual number of full-load hours is the time it will take a given transport asset to yield its annual transport if it is able to transport with its installed capacity all of the time.

attributes.name: operational_hours
attributes.description: The amount of hours per year the transport asset is operational

attributes.name: commissioning_date
attributes.description: If this date is in the future it is a planned asset in this energy system

attributes.name: decommissioning_date
attributes.description: If this date is in the past, it is an asset that has been decommissioned

attributes.name: installation_duration
attributes.description: the time required to install the asset (e.g. for calculating the effects on employment or the time it takes to construct and install the asset) in days

attributes.name: technical_lifetime
attributes.description: in years

attributes.name: surface_area
attributes.description: The surface that is occupied by this asset in m2

attributes.name: aggregated
attributes.description: Defines if this Asset is aggregated of other assets of the same type

attributes.name: aggregation_count
attributes.description: Number of assets that are aggregated

telemetryMetrics.name: gas_volume_consumption
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative volume of gas consumed.

telemetryMetrics.name: dc_voltage
telemetryMetrics.description: DC bus voltage.

telemetryMetrics.name: dc_current
telemetryMetrics.description: DC bus current.

telemetryMetrics.name: state_of_charge
telemetryMetrics.description: Battery state of charge.

telemetryMetrics.name: depth_of_discharge
telemetryMetrics.description: Depth of discharge.

telemetryMetrics.name: state_of_health
telemetryMetrics.description: Battery state of health.

telemetryMetrics.name: ac_power
telemetryMetrics.description: AC active power. Signed: positive = charging (energy into battery), negative = discharging (energy out of battery).

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_charge
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative energy delivered into the battery. Only present when the source reports charge energy separately.

telemetryMetrics.name: energy_discharge
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative energy drawn from the battery. Only present when the source reports discharge energy separately.

telemetryMetrics.name: power_charge
telemetryMetrics.description: Instantaneous charging power (energy flowing into the battery).

telemetryMetrics.name: power_discharge
telemetryMetrics.description: Instantaneous discharging power (energy flowing out of the battery).

telemetryMetrics.name: dc_voltage_max
telemetryMetrics.description: Maximum battery voltage observed in the reporting window.

telemetryMetrics.name: dc_voltage_min
telemetryMetrics.description: Minimum battery voltage observed in the reporting window.

telemetryMetrics.name: charge_cycles
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative number of charge/discharge cycles.

telemetryMetrics.name: operating_state
telemetryMetrics.description: Battery operating state reported by the device (e.g., Charging, Discharging, Idle, Fault).

telemetryMetrics.name: dc_power
telemetryMetrics.description: DC bus power (signed: positive = charging into battery, negative = discharging out). Computed as dc_voltage * dc_current for sources that don't report it directly.

telemetryMetrics.description: Instantaneous electrical power drawn by the heat pump.

telemetryMetrics.name: thermal_power_output
telemetryMetrics.description: Instantaneous thermal power delivered by the heat pump.

attributes.name: id
attributes.description: Unique identifier for this object

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Name describing this object

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Human readable description of this object

attributes.name: short_name
attributes.description: Short name for this object, e.g. used in legends of graphs in presentations

attributes.name: original_id_in_source
attributes.description: ID of item in the original data source.

attributes.name: asset_type
attributes.description: the type (e.g. model number) of the asset

attributes.name: owner
attributes.description: Defines the owner of an asset (free text).

attributes.name: state
attributes.description: The AssetStateEnum allows to specify the 'state' of an Asset, mainly used for manually simulating different scenarios.

attributes.name: capacity
attributes.description: The capacity of the transport asset.

attributes.name: efficiency
attributes.description: The efficiency of the transport asset.

attributes.name: full_load_hours
attributes.description: An annual number of full-load hours is the time it will take a given transport asset to yield its annual transport if it is able to transport with its installed capacity all of the time.

attributes.name: operational_hours
attributes.description: The amount of hours per year the transport asset is operational

attributes.name: commissioning_date
attributes.description: If this date is in the future it is a planned asset in this energy system

attributes.name: decommissioning_date
attributes.description: If this date is in the past, it is an asset that has been decommissioned

attributes.name: installation_duration
attributes.description: the time required to install the asset (e.g. for calculating the effects on employment or the time it takes to construct and install the asset) in days

attributes.name: technical_lifetime
attributes.description: in years

attributes.name: surface_area
attributes.description: The surface that is occupied by this asset in m2

attributes.name: aggregated
attributes.description: Defines if this Asset is aggregated of other assets of the same type

attributes.name: aggregation_count
attributes.description: Number of assets that are aggregated

telemetryMetrics.name: water_volume_consumption
telemetryMetrics.description: Cumulative volume of water consumed.
